📜 About Duchess Zandir

Born in the gutters of the merchant quarter of Saphen, Zandir’s life was meant to be brief and unnoticed. Yet from an early age, she displayed a mind sharper than steel and a tongue made for command. She could mimic, memorize, and master anything placed before her. By the time she turned sixteen, she had risen from beggar to bookkeeper; by eighteen, she had bought her nobility title outright—an act unheard of in Arcavium’s rigid social hierarchy. Her meteoric ascent drew the eye of courtiers, scholars, and merchants alike, but none could predict her fate when the divine card of The Empress fell into her hands during The Draw. The sun itself seemed to rise with her that day.

Chosen by The Empress, Zandir was transformed not just in power but in purpose. Where once she had sought survival, now she pursued legacy. Within a year, she became Duchess of Neussa, tasked with the sacred rite of rebirth—destroying the old city to raise a new one in the image of her Arcana.
